description: Web-based domain intelligence dashboard — enter any domain, get WHOIS registration data, DNS records, TLS certificate health, SPF/DMARC email security posture, and HTTPS response metrics in a single parallel lookup.
features: Parallel async lookups — WHOIS, DNS, TLS, email security, response timing all at once
WHOIS: registrar, creation/expiry dates, nameservers, status flags
DNS records: A, AAAA, MX (with priority), NS, TXT, CNAME
TLS: issuer, expiry countdown (color-coded), SANs list, protocol version
Email security: SPF record + all qualifier, DMARC policy badge, reports address
Response: HTTP status, latency, redirect chain, HSTS/X-Frame headers
Household domain shortcuts (trollefsen.com, clawdash, mvp, podda)
